name: Amazement Attendant Comica
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>驚楽園の案内人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アメイズメント・アテンダント</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ＜<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃｏｍｉｃａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コミカ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>＞
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Set 1 "Attraction" Trap directly from your Deck. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 of your "Attraction" Traps equipped to a monster; equip it to 1 "Amazement" monster you control or 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Amazement Attendant Comica" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Set 1 "Attraction" Trap directly from your Deck. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 of your "Attraction" Traps equipped to a monster; equip it to 1 "Amazement" monster you control or 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Amazement Attendant Comica" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Set 1 "Attraction" Trap directly from your Deck. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 of your "Attraction" Traps equipped to a monster; equip it to 1 "Amazement" monster you control or 1 face-up monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Amazement Attendant Comica" once per turn.

mst: Treats Trap Cards as Equip Cards
